Botiwalla by Chai Pani
Skip to Main content

WELCOME TO BOTIWALLA BY CHAI PANI
Indian Street Grill from Chef Meherwan Irani
OUR LOCATIONS
ATLANTA, GA  (Ponce City Market)
CHARLOTTE, NC  (Optimist Hall)
WEST ASHEVILLE, NC
DOWNTOWN ASHEVILLE, NC
"Prepare to Have Your Mind Blown"
"Extremely Satisfying"
"A Sizzling Delight"
BOTIWALLA MAKES YOU STRONG
ABOUT US
Botiwalla is inspired by the tea and kabab houses - known as Irani cafes - of Chef Meherwan's childhood, as well as the grills - sigris - that pop up on the streets of India late at night, serving grilled meats and flatbreads to hungry revelers.
Botiwalla is a counter service restaurant and no reservations are required.
LEARN MORE
JOIN OUR NEWSLETTER
Be the first to know what's new at Botiwalla!
SIGN UP
WHERE IT ALL BEGAN
The original Chai Pani opened in Asheville in 2009.
Chai Pani Decatur (Atlanta) opened in 2013.
Visit ChaiPani.com
WORK WITH US
We don't look at ourselves as a food company serving people, but as a people company serving food.
Learn More

Chaat (PCM)
Masala Smashed Potatoes
Crispy fingerling potatoes tossed with salt, chaat masala, lime juice, and cilantro. Served with spicy Maggi ketchup. (vegan)

MG Road Wings
Six dry-rubbed, crispy chicken wings seasoned with chilies, lime and spices. Served with a lime wedge and Curry Leaf Ranch. (milk, eggs)

Boti Rice Bowls (PCM)
Fragrant basmati rice cooked with yogurt, fried onions & biryani spices. Topped with skewer of your choice with julienned onions, roasted tomatoes, mint & cilantro. Served with raita.
Rice Bowl- Plain
Fragrant basmati rice cooked with yogurt, fried onions, & biryani spices. Topped with skewer of choice with julienned onions, roasted tomatoes, mint, cilantro. Served with raita. (vegetarian) (milk)
